# Weekly synthesis — 2026-W19

W18 closed on the SDS-vs-feed-forward fork. W19's reading sharpens the
feed-forward side: two of this week's Gaussian Splatting arrivals replace
per-scene optimisation with a single network forward pass over a sparse
view set, and a third paper is the corrective on the original 3DGS
densification schedule that everything downstream still inherits.

## The feed-forward Gaussian branch

[MVSplat](../../papers/arxiv-2403-14627/paper.md) (Chen et al., 2024)
and [latentSplat](../../papers/arxiv-2403-16292/paper.md) (Wewer et al.,
2024) both consume a handful of posed views and directly emit a 3D
Gaussian field. MVSplat uses a plane-sweep cost volume and per-pixel
depth unprojection; latentSplat frames the predictor as a VAE over
G…
W19 digest drafted. Anchors six papers (3DGS base + four W19 arrivals + LGM for the cross-reference) and surfaces multi-view-consistency under fast motion as the through-line gap.
